summary: Set 019 (2 sessions): responded to dabbler-platform's upstream-feedback-disposition-gate.md (2026-05-11). Session 1 (commit 94260a6) shipped disposition-gate discoverability fixes — new docs/disposition-schema.md (canonical reference: 7 fields, 3 invariants, minimal template, 3 variations), Step 8 of docs/ai-led-session-workflow.md names disposition.json + links to schema doc, both CloseoutGateFailure / invalid_invocation error messages in ai_router/close_session.py parameterize the actual path and link to the schema. Session 2 introduced spec-level field uatStyle: 'dsl' | 'ad-hoc' (default 'ad-hoc' per universal-core/gated-extensions philosophy), restructured §UAT Checklist Rule into shared-preamble + DSL-driven (Playwright + uat-coverage-review) + Ad-hoc (per-item ProgrammaticVerification or NoProgrammaticPathReason) subsections, mirrored §Choosing uatStyle heuristic into both ai-led-session-workflow.md and session-set-authoring-guide.md, split Rule 11 into 11a/11b preserving existing references, updated wizard's session-gen prompt to include uatStyle, added one-line disposition-schema back-link from ai_router/docs/close-out.md, authored docs/upstream-feedback/2026-05-11-w0-runner-pre-signin-conflict.md as GitHub-issue-ready hand-off for darndestdabbler/dabbler-uat-dsl. Cross-provider verification via ai_router routed to GPT-5.4 (2 rounds, $0.2131 metered total within $0.10-$0.25 projection): Round 1 returned ISSUES_FOUND with 1 Major + 1 Minor (invalid combination uatStyle='dsl'+requiresE2E=false not explicit; mixed-surfaces escape hatch incoherent for DSL mode), both addressed in-session via new 'Invalid combination' paragraphs and a rewritten mixed-surfaces guidance requiring uatStyle='ad-hoc' for combined sets. Round 2 returned VERIFIED with no new issues. Migration note for dabbler-platform documented in change-log.md and authoring guide (existing UAT-enabled specs need to add uatStyle: 'dsl' explicitly to preserve current behavior; default 'ad-hoc' would silently downgrade their gate). --write-template flag for close_session deferred per Session 1 operator decision; uat-checklist-editor schema explicit support deferred; W0 runner code change deferred to dabbler-uat-dsl repo. 729/731 tests passing (the 2 failures are pre-existing test_restart_role.py Windows subprocess PID-mismatch flakes, confirmed unrelated via stashed-baseline run in Session 1). Disposition gate of Session 1 dogfooded on this set — close_session finds a valid disposition.json (this file) with all required fields populated.
